hero.sub: Since 2017, at the heart of Medellín, bringing hope, restoration, and purpose.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: We are not a traditional church.
about.subtitle: We are a movement.
about.body: The Church Medellín has been at the heart of one of the most resilient cities in Latin America, bringing hope, restoration, and purpose to communities long marked by violence, poverty, and exclusion. We go to the people, enter the territories, and get directly involved in the transformation of lives.
about.conviction: When one life is transformed, a family changes. When a family changes, an entire community rises.
about.mision: To transform lives, families and communities through the gospel — sustainably and expansively.

historia.label: Our Story
historia.title: A journey of faith
historia.intro: Every location is a testimony of obedience and growth.

items.desc: With a small group and a big promise, we started believing that God would do what only He can do.
Our first steps as a congregation, with the dream of impacting a city.
Growing in community, forming leaders, expanding the reach.
Moving forward through adversity, building a sustainable model of transformation.
Since 2023, advancing in purpose. A new campus, new lives, the same fire.

historia.frase: The Lord has done great things for us, and we are filled with joy

impacto.label: Social Impact
impacto.title: Where others don't go
impacto.intro: We work where change is most urgent and love is most needed.
impacto.made_body: A comprehensive transformation model that seeks to carry the message of Jesus and generate sustainable impact in government, military, education, sports, and the prison system.

cards.title: Women
cards.body: We accompany women who have lived through contexts of prostitution, abuse and abandonment, helping them rebuild their identity, self-esteem and life project.

cards.title: Youth
cards.body: We work with young people who grew up surrounded by drugs and violence. Through community and training, we now see new life paths with purpose.

cards.title: Men
cards.body: Men who now lead communities, once involved in gangs. Today they work honestly, have restored their families and are positive references.

cards.title: Children & Teens
cards.sub: The generation that will grow differently
cards.body: We invest in forming children and adolescents with values, identity and purpose, planting a generation that will not repeat the stories of the past.

impacto.noches_title: The model that goes where others don't
impacto.noches_body: Every week, teams of leaders are deployed in neighborhoods and districts of Medellín to create meeting spaces where people can experience faith, community and restoration — without needing to leave their context.
noches_items: Leadership formed within the same territory

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: Why Medellín
vision.body: Medellín is a city the world knows for its past... but that today is writing a new story. After decades marked by conflict, it represents one of the most relevant cases of urban transformation in the world. However, in many districts, inequality, structural violence and lack of opportunities persist.
diferencia_items: Real presence in the territory — we don't operate from a distance
Relational and sustainable model — we don't depend on mass events
Formation of local leaders — change stays in the community
Integral focus — spiritual, social and economic
Expansion capacity — replicable model in new cities
vision.largo_body: We believe in a church that not only grows, but establishes itself, consolidates and multiplies. We are working toward a space that becomes a transformation center for the city, a sending point toward new territories, and a platform to scale the model to Rionegro, Bello and more municipalities.

donar.label: Give
donar.title: Be part of the transformation
donar.body: Your investment here changes real stories, strengthens entire communities and builds a model that can be replicated in other cities. This is not just social impact. It's transformation with eternal purpose.
how_items: Physical infrastructure development — spaces for greater reach and capacity.
Leader formation and multiplication across all segments.
Transformation programs: women, youth, men, children.
donar.infra_body: We are taking a strategic step toward consolidating our own space — a place that allows sustained massive impact, continuous operation without restrictions, and model scalability.

contacto.label: Connect
contacto.title: Medellín is ready.
contacto.body: If you are evaluating where to invest your time, resources and trust, we want to talk with you. The model is working. Now is the moment to scale.

ubicacion.title: Come home
ubicacion.dir2: Half a block from Parque de las Chimeneas
